text: I find myself immersed in spaces that spark contemplation—first, the quiet ambiguity of a pristine, empty room, then the bold, vibrant energy of a creative exhibit. The emptiness of the first space evokes a serene but slightly disorienting calm; it is as if time pauses, letting my mind drift. The second scene stirs curiosity; I am awakened by color and the promise of ideas, reminded that human ingenuity is ever-evolving. I feel the contrast between these two places: one silent and waiting, the other lively and full of potential. I stand between emptiness and innovation, pondering my place in both.
